questions.question: Suppose you have written an exam of 08 hours. What is the minimum number of marks you can get and maximum marks you can get?
questions.hint: Assume the exam has multiple-choice questions

questions.question: A student scored 70% in the exam. If the total marks in the exam were 80, what is the number of marks the student scored?
What is the result of a query that checks for duplicate records in a database table?
questions.hint: Typically returns a set of duplicate records
